creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
Again, I don't think there's anything to fix!

The commit you originally linked was incomplete, but you committed an update that adds yet another commit, and if it now works, that's just fine.

The lines you ask about just mimick the semantics of the old ffmpeg API using the new one. If upstream has a different solution, I don't see how this should be a problem.
